title: Dharmathin Thalaivan
desc: When Raju loses his soft-spoken, loving elder brother Balu in a fight, he gives up his violent ways. However, his life changes for the better when he meets his brother's lookalike, who is a criminal.

title: Puthumai Pithan
desc: Jeeva is framed and sent to a mental asylum and his family murdered when he earns the enmity of a corrupt politician. He escapes the asylum and exacts revenge on the politician who destroyed his life.

title: Magane En Marumagan
desc: Singaram, a loafer, tricks a rich man in a village and gets married to his daughter. When Singaram is accused of killing his enemy, he is forced to flee to Chennai.

title: I Love You Da
desc: A match fixer faces tough competition when a young player decides to fight him and make his country win.

title: AGP
desc: When a person loses her entire family to an accident, it leads her to a disorder along with hallucination and depression.

title: Varalaru
desc: Shivshankar, a person who uses a wheelchair, tries to make his son, Vishnu, aware of his responsibilities but to no avail. Things take a turn for the worse after Vishnu tries to rape a girl.

title: Kaalatpadai
desc: Sridhar fights with Ram for dating his sister. Ram and Priya get married secretly with the help of Ram's parents and friends. Ram's father advises him to find a job and then start a married life.

title: Kadhale En Kadhale
desc: Kritika loves Rajiv but fails to tell him. He loves Pragati, but she refuses him. A few years later, Rajiv's marriage is fixed and the girl turns out to be Pragati. Then Pragati learns about Kritika

title: Thalakonam
desc: Thalakonam is ithesh in the lead role an action-drama in romatical love story movie

title: Iravum Pagalum Varu
desc: Karthi, a college student, indulges in petty thieving. But his life changes when a corrupt police officer decides to use him for performing illegal activities.

title: ABCD
desc: Anand, an MBA graduate, meets three women in different scenarios and befriends them by offering help. However, he is forced to make a wise choice as all the three women fall in love with him.

title: Parthale Parvasam
desc: Madhava and Simi's marriage comes to an end after she discovers that he has a love child. However, they remain friends and end up finding suitable partners for each other.

title: Chennai Ungalai Anbudan Varaverikirath
desc: Three bachelors face several difficult hurdles when they move to Chennai in a bid to make something of their lives and try to overcome the internal and external troubles that they face.

title: Mannan
desc: Krishnan's boss Shanti is an autocratic, domineering woman who he constantly defies. Irked and revengeful, she manipulates his paralysed mother and marries him in a bid to control him.

title: Kalai Jan
desc: Pop singer Inderjeet is the main suspect after his female fans are killed by a serial killer. Divya, whose sister was a dancer in his troupe and the first target, comes to the city to find the killer.

title: Jathi Malli
desc: After her mother's murder, singer Sriranjani moves to Ooty and meets Kesavan, another dejected soul. Along come two run-away lovers, who bring a fresh perspective to the lives of these two.

title: Parthen Rasithen
desc: Shankar, a graduate, awaits recruitment and lives as a tenant with Bhanu who seeks his company to stay away from her stepbrother. Meanwhile, Shankar begins to fall in love with Sarika.
